emails.subject: Inactivate books
emails.body: Inactivate books Please inactivate the FT-INT-CNT-TRAN book in TAGG. All of the sub books associated with this should also be inactivated, i.e. Price, Basis, Index and GD. The trader responsible for these books has been gone for over 6 months and all the deals in that book have now rolled off. If you need any further information, please feel free to give me a shout. Thanks for your help. PL
